chunks.title: Sanballat's Repeated Invitations
chunks.reason: A continuous exchange of messages where Nehemiah resists Sanballat's attempts to lure him out of the wall construction.

chunks.title: The Trap at Shemaiah's House
chunks.reason: A narrative account of Nehemiah recognizing a false prophet sent to scare him into the temple and his subsequent prayer for judgment.

chunks.title: Completion of the Wall
chunks.reason: A summary statement describing the completion of the wall in fifty-two days and the reaction of the surrounding nations.

chunks.title: Nobles' Alliance with Tobiah
chunks.reason: An explanation of the political and familial ties between the nobles of Judah and Tobiah that undermined Nehemiah's leadership.
